race.comment: KICKATINALONG (1) ran a better race last Saturday when third-up from a spell, showing pace only to tire close to home over 1350m at Doomben. Big class drop today and should be cherry ripe now. RASHFORD (2) was shuffled back early then made some late inroads without threatening last time out over 1650m at Doomben. The winner of that race came out and scored again in town last Saturday. Won't mind coming back in trip. Has the class to test this field. DO IT FOR YOU (7) made it two big wins from as many runs this prep when he demolished a BM58 field over a similar trip to this at Lismore recently. Steps up in class now and often peaks after a couple of runs back but that last win was too dominant to ignore. GAVIN (8) struggled first-up over a sharper trip at Grafton. Placed two from three when second-up and this trip is more to his liking. Locally trained MONARCH EXPRESS (5) is back from a nine-week break and is worth including in exotics.
